name: Mega Sweet Fruits   Popper
description: Welcome to Mega Sweet Fruits - Popper! Take on 125 exciting levels filled with colorful fruits, plan your moves, and test your skills. But be careful! Some fruits hide bombs that can cost you a life. Every move matters! Upgrade your abilities: increase your tap power, boost your starting lives, and use powerful pomegranates to clear the screen in one strike! Each level gets more challenging, keeping the fun fresh and intense. Unlock 9 mysterious achievements, grow stronger, and prove your mastery! With 8 supported languages (English, Russian, French, Turkish, Spanish, German, Italian, Portuguese)
instructions: Tap on groups of matching fruits horizontal vertical or diagonal to pop them Earn points with every pop but watch out some fruits hide bombs that cost you 1 life If your lives drop to zero it rsquo s game over mdash so think strategically
